message:
test(terminal_model): add 69 edge-case tests for ANSI terminal model (bd-cfzy4)

Cover ModelCell defaults/with_char/eq/clone, SgrState defaults/reset,
ModeFlags new vs Default, zero-dimension clamping, cell/row/current_cell
access with OOB, row_text trimming, link_url for invalid/zero IDs,
CHA/VPA positioning and clamping, backspace at column 0, tab stops and
clamping, ESC 7/8/=/>/unknown/double-ESC, EL modes 1/2, ED modes 0/1,
SGR italic/underline/dim/strikethrough/reverse, SGR remove bold/italic,
SGR basic bg/default fg(39)/default bg(49)/bright fg/bg, SGR 256
grayscale/basic/bright ranges, SGR empty params reset, sync output
saturating/nesting, diff_grid identical/different/size-mismatch,
dump_sequences OSC/ST/C0/trailing-ESC/unknown, erase with current bg,
multiple hyperlinks, OSC8 with ST terminator, wide char two-cell,
CUP with 'f' byte, CSI unknown/save-restore/intermediate, BEL ignored,
CUP clamping, relative moves at boundaries, reset preserves dimensions,
LF at bottom row.

102 total tests (33 existing + 69 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
